plugins.name: codebase-architecture-doc-builder
plugins.description: Author or refresh a project's ARCHITECTURE.md in the rust-analyzer style: Bird's Eye View, Code Map with Architecture Invariant call-outs, and Cross-Cutting Concerns.

plugins.name: commit-commands
plugins.description: Streamline your git workflow with simple commands for committing, pushing, and creating pull requests

plugins.name: karpathy-guidelines
plugins.description: Behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes. Use when writing, reviewing, or refactoring code to avoid overcomplication, make surgical changes, surface assumptions, and define verifiable success criteria.

plugins.name: rocky-pal
plugins.description: Rocky style plugin with SKILL.md-driven UserPromptSubmit auto-injection and explicit machine-format bypass

plugins.name: package-release
plugins.description: Automate package versioning and changelog generation using conventional commit standards

plugins.name: mail-cli
plugins.description: Email workflows via CLI backends, starting with the himalaya CLI for reading, searching, summarizing, composing, replying, forwarding, and managing mail across IMAP/Maildir accounts, with a strict confirm-before-send workflow.

plugins.name: macos-cleanup
plugins.description: macOS cleanup and disk-space recovery workflows using Mole's mo CLI, with dry-run-first safety guidance for cleanup, app uninstall, project artifact purge, installer cleanup, disk analysis, optimization, and health checks.
